overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in futuristic armor exploring an industrial space station interior. The character walks past graffiti-covered walls, through hazy industrial walkways, up a staircase flanked by guards, and into a clean modern reception area to interact with an NPC.

brown cardboard boxes with packing tape

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by metal railings, passing two stationary guards at the top. The environment transitions from gritty industrial to a cleaner lobby with automatic doors and potted plants.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a well-lit modern reception area with abstract art on the walls and approaches a curved wooden reception desk. A receptionist stands behind the desk as the character stops to interact.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial sector that gradually transitions into a polished, modern corporate interior. It begins in a narrow corridor beside a green metal wall marked with graffiti, moving past a worn sofa and scattered boxes. As the path opens, the camera follows the character into a vast, hazy industrial bay filled with massive pipes and metal walkways before turning toward a wide concrete staircase. The scene then shifts from the industrial grime to a cleaner lobby as the character ascends the stairs past two stationary guards and passes through automatic doors. Finally, the environment opens into a well-lit reception area featuring abstract art and potted plants, ending as the character approaches a curved wooden desk to interact with a receptionist.
